name: Assault
effect: This attack gains +1 attack dice at half range.

name: Blast
effect: For the next attack with this weapon, if the attack has at least one hit or crit, all fighters (friend and foe) within 2" of the target suffer damage equal to a hit damage.

name: Brutal
effect: After an attack roll with this weapon, upgrade one hit to a crit.

name: Concussive
effect: After performing an attack with this weapon, if at least one hit or crit is scored, the target is shoved 3" directly away from the attacker.

name: Heavy
effect: This weapon cannot be fired if the Fighter has moved more than 2" this turn.

name: Lethal
effect: If an attack with this weapon would normally crit on a 6, it now also crits on a 5.

name: Limited(1)
effect: This item can only be used once per battle.

name: Parry
effect: When this fighter is targeted in melee, increase their Defence by 1.

name: Piercing
effect: For the next attack with this weapon, subtract 2 from the target’s Defence to a minimun of 3.

name: Pistol
effect: Pistols are one-handed weapons. When in melee range (0-3) attacks with this weapon use Ballistic Skill.

name: Rapid Fire
effect: For the rest of the turn, attacks with this weapon gain +1 attack dice.

name: Reliable
effect: If this attack rolls no hits or crits, change one miss to a hit.

name: Silent
effect: Making this attack does not trigger reactions or abilities from enemy fighters.

name: Spread
effect: This attack may target up to two targets within 1" of each other.

name: Stun
effect: Target fighter loses their next action and cannot make reactions until their next activation.

name: Unwieldy
effect: This fighter cannot use this weapon to make Reactions.

name: Suppressive
effect: Targets hit by this weapon must spend their next action to make a Move action toward the nearest cover.

name: Precision
effect: This attack ignores the +1 cover bonus when the target is within half range.

name: Point-Blank
effect: When attacking a target within 3", this weapon crits on a 5+.

name: High Impact
effect: Critical hits with this weapon deal +2 damage instead of the standard value.

name: Sniper
effect: If this fighter did not move this turn, they may add +12" to the maximum range of this attack.
